data.name: Linux_ShortcutListener_Register_FailedToGrabHotkey
data.value: Failed to grab the hotkey. The key combination may be already in use.

data.name: Linux_BuiltInChatPlugin_FdFind_Description
data.value: Search for files on your computer using fd-find (a high-performance local file search tool). This tool requires fd-find to be installed to use.

data.name: Linux_BuiltInChatPlugin_FdFind_SearchFiles_Description
data.value: Search for files or directories on Linux using fd-find.

data.name: Linux_BuiltInChatPlugin_Bash_Description
data.value: Provides the ability to execute bash scripts, allowing direct interaction with the system. However, it is also dangerous and may result in accidental file deletion or system crashes.
